title: Ben-y@miyniy #1145
definition:
Benjamite = "a son of the right hand"

 1) one of the tribe of Benjamin

 \^ynymyh-Nb\^ Ben-ha-y@miniy with \\0376\\ inserted (\\#1Sa 9:1\\)
 \^ynymy vya-Nb\^ Ben-'Iysh Y@miyniy son of a man of Jemini;
 or short (\\#1Sa 9:4; Es 2:5\\) \^ynymy vya\^ 'Iysh Y@miyniy a man of Jemini,
 or (\\#1Sa 20:1\\) simply \^ynymy\^ Y@miyniy a Jeminite;
 (plur. \^ynymy ynb\^ B@niy Y@miyniy )
